title: CL-1005 — Life insurance claim, bereavement, single-adult policyholder
content: Deceased: Robert Hayes, 58, policyholder of a $450,000 term life policy, in-force since 2014, premiums up-to-date. Date of death 2026-04-15 from natural causes (myocardial infarction). Beneficiary: spouse Annette Hayes (sole nominated). Claim notified by Annette via Customer Communications on 2026-04-19 with high vulnerability indicators (recent bereavement, primary carer for adult child with disability). Required documents: certified death certificate (received 2026-04-23), proof of beneficiary identity (received), policy schedule (on file). No exclusions apply (death within first 13 months of policy review or self-inflicted causes are the typical exclusions and neither applies). Recommended path: priority settlement, hand-off to Settlement Officer with empathetic communications template B-LIFE-02. Reserve $450,000.
